article_title: 10 个 Async/Await 错误正在拖垮你的 ASP.NET Core API 性能
core_theme: ASP.NET Core 中 10 个常见的 async/await 误用及其对生产环境性能的真实影响
reader_takeaway: 学会识别和修复 10 个最常见的 async/await 错误，理解每个修复如何直接转化为吞吐量和延迟改善
summary_angle: 从线程池饥饿、1,200 RPS 到 4,500 RPS、零死锁——一次 async 审计如何用两星期换来 3.75 倍吞吐量

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文 TL;DR 表格与 Mattrx 总览：线程池饥饿 4/week、p95 8.2s、死锁 3/month
information_blocks.visual_idea: 画面左侧暗部：拥堵的请求队列，被阻塞的线程如停滞的车道

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文 10 个错误编号：.Result、async void、Sequential await 等
information_blocks.visual_idea: 画面中部过渡：代码片段幻化为修复管道，从串行变为并行

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文 Mattrx 汇总：4500 RPS、p95 1.4s、线程 110→22、零事故
information_blocks.visual_idea: 画面右侧亮部：畅通的并行管道，清晰的数据流箭头，绿色通过标记

main_metaphor: 交通拥堵疏通——左侧堵塞的车道代表被 .Result 和 async void 拖垮的线程池，右侧畅通的并行车道代表修复后的异步流
primary_subject: 一条从拥堵分流为多个并行车道的高速路
subject_action: 请求流从左向右穿过画面，在中间经过代码结构的疏导，分流为多个并行通道后加速通过
selected_style_prompt_descriptor: high-contrast cinematic illustration, strong key light, deep shadows, wide-screen composition, dramatic but realistic color grading
selected_style_reason: 用户未指定风格，本篇从 40 项风格池随机选中；本文强调 before/after 代码修复带来的性能对比，高对比电影风的强明暗对照天然适合表达'困境→改善'的叙事张力
style_safety_note: 清单风格为泛类型描述，不涉及品牌、工作室或艺术家复刻
draft_goal: 验证左右对照构图 + 三个信息块的叙事节奏和高对比电影风格是否成立
revision_targets: 信息块标签可读性和位置
左右明暗过渡是否自然
是否出现假 UI/假图表元素
final_prompt:
Use case: infographic-story
Asset type: wide cover infographic illustration for a Chinese tech blog article
Primary request: Create a wide cinematic infographic-story cover illustration that summarizes the article. Theme: 10 common async/await mistakes in ASP.NET Core and their real production impact. The reader should quickly feel the dramatic performance transformation from thread-pool starvation to optimized throughput.

Summary angle: From thread-pool starvation at 1,200 RPS to 4,500 RPS and zero deadlocks — how a 2-week async audit delivered 3.75x throughput.
Narrative flow: before-after. In a 2.35:1 frame, keep one dominant focal subject and 2-4 supporting narrative beats. Each beat must map to the article's information blocks rather than generic decoration.
Information blocks:
- Problem: Left side, dark and congested, a blocked thread pool lane with queued requests, labeled '修复前 1200 RPS'
- Mechanism: Center transition, code patterns transforming from sequential blocked lanes into parallel async pipelines, labeled '10 个陷阱'
- Evidence: Right side, bright and flowing, clean parallel lanes with green throughput indicators, labeled '修复后 4500 RPS'

Main metaphor: Traffic jam clearing — congested thread lanes on the left transforming into smooth parallel async pipelines on the right.
Subject: A multi-lane data highway flowing from left (congested, blocked) to right (parallel, optimized), with the center showing the code-structure transformation.
Composition/framing: Left-right contrast composition. Prefer horizontal storytelling that stays legible in a wide cover.
Style/medium: combine editorial technical illustration with the selected visual style descriptor: high-contrast cinematic illustration, strong key light, deep shadows, wide-screen composition, dramatic but realistic color grading. Stylized, polished, editorial, visually strong, and clearly readable as an infographic-style summary cover. Do not imitate a specific brand, studio, or living artist.
Color palette: Dark blue-gray (congested side), warm orange (transition), emerald green (optimized side), deep black (contrast/shadows).
Visible text policy: allow only 1-3 short Chinese labels or number chips by default, sourced from the information blocks. Each label <= 6 Chinese characters or one required product/model name. No poster title, no long sentences, no English slogans, no fake UI labels, no fake chart axes, no fake architecture node names.
Constraints: no watermark, no prompt residue, no screenshots, no dashboards, no fake diagrams, no fake charts, no fake terminal output, no fabricated metrics, no unrelated icon collage, no decorative clutter.
Avoid: floating chips, meaningless code rain, neon skyscraper backgrounds, generic robot poses, cyberpunk purple-blue light pollution, massive HUD overlays, fake dashboards, fake terminals, fake architecture labels.
